ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 is Confirmed
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.com! Your order has been confirmed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
- Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
- Order Date: 2026-04-14
- Items:
  1. Wireless Mouse – $25.99
  2. USB‑C Hub – $45.50
- Total: $71.49 (incl. tax and shipping)

Shipping Address:
[Customer Name]
[Street Address]
[City], [State] [ZIP]

Delivery Date: 2026-04-18

If you have any questions about your order, please visit <URL> or simply reply to this email.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com Team

spam.subject: Ticket #987654: Password Reset Request
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

An IT helpdesk ticket has been created on your behalf to reset your corporate password. Please follow the instructions below to complete the reset.

Ticket ID: 987654
Date Created: 2026-04-14

Per our security policy, you must reset your password within 24 hours of receiving this message. Failure to do so will result in an automatic account lockout.

To reset your password, click the secure link: <URL>

If you did not initiate this request, or believe your account has been compromised, please contact the IT Help Desk immediately at (123) 456-7890.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
IT Help Desk
Corporate Security Team
